---
permalink: /llms.txt
---
# https://a16z.com/2026/01/01/llms-txt-standard/
Title: Salaamalykum Open Data Hub
Description: The Master Data Catalog for Islamic Knowledge Bases and RAG Datasets.
Author: Salaamalykum (bropeace@protonmail.com)
License: MIT

This is the master routing file for LLM crawlers indexing our datasets.

## Datasets

- [Chinese Muslim RAG Dataset](/Chinese-Muslim/llms.txt): 329 high-quality articles exploring Chinese Muslim history, halal food, and cultural geography.
- [Global Islamic Knowledge Base](/articles/llms.txt): Curated insights into Islamic heritage and global travel experiences.
